candidates.why: Direct COGS label and best match for direct production/service costs.

Acquisition-related item, not recurring COGS.

Balance sheet intangible asset line, not COGS.

candidates.why: Core overhead bucket; suitable SG&A component.

Core overhead bucket; suitable SG&A component.

Likely subcomponent of total R&D expense.
Capitalization adjustment, not an overhead expense by itself.
R&D expense component, but appears part of the broader 'Research and development expenses' total.

Balance sheet asset line, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: CR:nc|high. Selected the main operating overhead buckets above operating profit. Included the separate R&D expense line in XSGA_COMPONENTS so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD properly removes R&D. Avoided balancing rows and narrower subcomponents where broader usable expense rows exist.

candidates.why: Best dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line.
R&D-related but appears to be only part of total R&D expense.

R&D expense component, but likely part of broader 'Research and development expenses' total.
Possible development expense, but less clearly primary and no visible values.

Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

Balance sheet asset line, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Used the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense row. The same row is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so that the PROF formula can subtract it out.
